1 Stack: Increase Str buff max stack,  required combo -1
2 Stacks: Increase Str Act buff max stack. Whenever your ability deck is shuffled, all drawn abilities will be of the Str type.
3 Stacks: Ability that doesn't give any stat combo will now give 1 Str combo.

1 Stack: Increase Agi buff max stack,  required combo -1
2 Stacks: Increase Agi Act buff max stack. Whenever your ability deck is shuffled, all drawn abilities will be of the Agi type.
3 Stacks: Ability that doesn't give any stat combo will now give 1 Agi combo.

1 Stack: Increase Int buff max stack,  required combo -1
2 Stacks: Increase Int Act buff max stack. Whenever your ability deck is shuffled, all drawn abilities will be of the Int type.
3 Stacks: Ability that doesn't give any stat combo will now give 1 Int combo.

1 Stack: Increase MaxHP buff max stack,  required combo -1
2 Stacks: Increase MaxHP Act buff max stack. Whenever your ability deck is shuffled, all drawn abilities will be of the MaxHP type.
3 Stacks: Ability that doesn't give any stat combo will now give 1 MaxHP combo.

(Player Only) Gain a random buff from Do, Re, or Mi if you start a combat without any of these buffs. Additionally, on triggering any Do, Re Mi three stacks effect, for each stack, there is a 20% chance that a random Do, Re, Mi ability in your discard pile will be recovered to your hand.
(Player Only) Traps will appear more often during a dungeon run. Halve the damage, status effects applied and money gain from traps.

(Player) When facing the enemies you defeated at least 3 times before. (Enemy Monster) If the player had encountered this monster at least 3 times before. (Effect) Start the combat with AP +1 and a Certain buff.
(Enemy Only) When facing enemies of the opposite gender who are not gender ambiguous, double the damage dealt to them.

Increase the steal amount of [Steal] abilities. Additionally, when using [Steal] abilities, there is a 50% chance to snatch a random buff from your opponent. (Except Invunlerable, Second Chance and Elements)
When the following debuffs (Paralysis, Blind, Dizzy and Reflux) are triggered on you, or upon receiving a Taunt debuff, gain 3 stack of Rage buff and 1 stack of Pent-Up Power.
When hitting your opponent with a [Lifesteal] skill, if the opponent is of the same race as you, gain 2 stack of Instinct Buff. If not, gain a X Form buff. (X is the race of your opponent).

The user cannot gain elemental stacks or elemental buffs, and elemental effects are removed from their abilities. Increases the damage, healing, and Protect gain of non-elemental abilities by 20%, and reduces elemental damage taken by 20%.
Increase dungeon coin gain by 10% (Stack with secondary character)

Exhaust any curse on use
Loose 5% HP and auto discard curse on hand on end turn

If your buff or the opponent's debuff is removed by a skill effect (rather than the usual removal condition), there is a 25% chance that it will be sustained
[Raw] damage, healing, and Protect values will now utilize and be affected by action buff and vulnerabilities from any other stat.
(Player Only)  At the start of combat, reduce the cooldown of your monster’s active skills by 1. Whenever a monster active skill is used, you gains 1 stack of Reflux and 3 stacks of Gamble Token.
Gain 2 Gamble Token whenever you use a Curse ability.
Gamble skills will always roll a 3. For every 2 gamble token you gain, convert it into a random buff.
Each time you roll a 1 or 2, you get a random debuff. Each time you roll a 5 or 6, you get a random buff.

Roll a die at the beginning of each round and adjust AP based on the number rolled:
1: -3 AP, 2: -2 AP, 3: -1 AP, 4: +1 AP, 5: +2 AP, 6: +3 AP

Reduce damage dealt to and received from Humanoid enemies by 20%. (Player Only) If the other equipped monster is race Humanoid, upon its fatal damage automatically swap to this monster, recover 50% HP, gain 20 Rage and 7 Pent Up Power. The fallen monster can no longer be swapped back this battle.

Reduce damage dealt to and received from Beast enemies by 20%. (Player Only) If the other equipped monster is race Beast, upon its fatal damage automatically swap to this monster, recover 50% HP, gain 20 Rage and 7 Pent Up Power. The fallen monster can no longer be swapped back this battle.

Reduce damage dealt to and received from Spirit enemies by 20%. (Player Only) If the other equipped monster is race Spirit, upon its fatal damage automatically swap to this monster, recover 50% HP, gain 20 Rage and 7 Pent Up Power. The fallen monster can no longer be swapped back this battle.

Reduce damage dealt to and received from Inorganic enemies by 20%. (Player Only) If the other equipped monster is race Inorganic, upon its fatal damage automatically swap to this monster, recover 50% HP, gain 20 Rage and 7 Pent Up Power. The fallen monster can no longer be swapped back this battle.

(Player Only) At the start of combat,
If HP is 100%, gain 2 Pure Element.
If HP is below 50%, instead gain a Second Chance.
If HP is below 30%, instead gain a Second Chance and 7 random buffs.
